# nullcloud_loadbalancer (Resource)

Manages a NullCloud load balancer.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "nullcloud_loadbalancer" "example" {
  name     = "my-lb"
  protocol = "https"
  port     = 443
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the load balancer.
- `port` (Number) Port the load balancer listens on (1-65535).
- `protocol` (String) Protocol for the load balancer. Must be tcp, http, or https.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `crn` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String)
